text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Trainer! Please watch my race closely today!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
My running last time was a bit disappointing, but
I'll make sure everyone's jaw drops this time!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Okay! I'm gonna put all the hard work we've done
on full display today!
